parameters.name: messages
parameters.value:
=[{"role":"user","content":"You are a social media strategist for iVisa, a visa facilitation service. Based on the weekly CSOV (Credibility Share of Voice) data below, generate specific, actionable social media recommendations.

CSOV DATA:
{{JSON.stringify($json.summary, null, 2)}}

Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown, no explanation) in this exact format:
{
  "next_steps": [
    "Step 1 text (specific, actionable, 1-2 sentences)",
    "Step 2 text",
    "Step 3 text",
    "Step 4 text",
    "Step 5 text"
  ],
  "content_ideas": [
    {
      "icon": "🛡️",
      "title": "Content idea title",
      "detail": "Why this idea, which platform, what format",
      "pillar": "Social Proof",
      "platforms": ["Instagram", "TikTok"],
      "priority": "high"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
- next_steps: 5 items, each directly tied to improving the CSOV score or addressing flagged issues
- content_ideas: 5 items, each mapped to a content pillar (Social Proof, Educational, or Humor/Relatability/Entertainment)
- Focus on: countering negative Reddit/BBB results, clarifying fees as value, government-independence messaging, security/trust
- Be specific to iVisa — not generic advice"}]
